title: DocAnalysisV1
description: Analysis produced by the Document Analyzer agent — per-section rewrite instructions aligned to a job description.

document_title.description: Inferred title or name of the document (e.g. candidate name for a CV).

job_title.description: Target job title extracted from the job description.

overall_strategy.description: High-level strategy for aligning the document to the job description.

index.description: Zero-based section index matching the parsed document order.

needs_rewrite.description: Whether this section requires substantive rewriting.

rewrite_instructions.description: Specific, actionable instructions for rewriting this section.

keywords_to_add.description: Keywords and phrases from the job description to incorporate.
